subject: (no subject)
body: catherine,, I am concerned that your e mails seem out of context and character.. you were neither fired as you last emails suggest, your phone was not turned off, as this last email suggested, and have not cantacted me , though you had written it was your intention to do so.. I hope thing s with you are fine, and would appreciate a call or return to this , communication. your friends are worried    jeffrey
